Chapter 3: Puffy Rewards
Puffy again,

Quick update, sea squad! We thank you for tossing your stETH carrots.

It's now time to reward you for entrusting your stETH to Puffy. 🥕

You were invited for Chapter 3, register and earn staking multipliers and double your Puffer Points.

Dive in,
